description_long: This object is a large, industrial-style fax machine with a robust, boxy form and a matte black finish. The front features two prominent cylindrical rollers, likely for feeding and processing paper, set within a recessed compartment. The left side displays three round dials and a thick, flexible hose, suggesting connections for power or data. The rear view reveals additional venting and the continuation of the hose, while the right side is equipped with three vertical indicator tubes, a pressure gauge, and a detailed control panel with buttons and a small display. Warning labels and vent grilles are visible, emphasizing its heavy-duty, utilitarian design. The overall construction appears metallic, with some plastic and rubber components for controls and hoses.
description: A large, industrial black fax machine with dual rollers, control panel, indicator tubes, and a thick hose, featuring a rugged, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large cylindrical rollers, a recessed compartment, and a warning label.
description_view_1: Left side view with three round dials and a thick, flexible hose attached at the bottom.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the rollers, vent grilles, and the hose extending outward.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring three vertical indicator tubes, a pressure gauge, and a detailed control panel with buttons and a display.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the right side of the machine, featuring a rectangular arrangement with a cluster of buttons below a small display screen. Indicator lights are positioned above the buttons, and the panel is adjacent to three vertical indicator tubes and a round pressure gauge.
attribute_paper_tray_design: No traditional paper tray is visible; paper appears to be fed through the dual rollers at the front, with no adjustable guides or covers apparent.
attribute_output_slot_location: The output slot is located at the front center, directly below the dual rollers within the recessed compartment.
attribute_handset_attachment: No telephone handset is visible or attached to the object.
